entry.title: FEAR NO ONE - LTD. ED.
entry.summary:
Vendor: dripdrip.dopedesk
Type:
Price: 2409.00

420 GSM
PREMIUM 100% COTTON FLEECE
RAGLAN SLEEVE CONSTRUCTION
HIGH-DENSITY FRONT & BACK PRINT
KANGAROO POCKET WITH STRUCTURED HOOD
UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Ultra-heavy 420 GSM fabric delivers superior structure, warmth, and durability.
  • Relaxed, baggy fit designed for effortless movement and everyday comfort.
  • Raglan sleeves enhance mobility while adding a modern, athletic edge.
  • High-density “DRIP STUDIOS – FEAR NO ONE” front print makes a bold statement.
  • Curved “FOCUS YOUR ENERGY” back graphic adds depth and visual impact.
  • Functional kangaroo pocket provides warmth and daily utility.
  • Soft, breathable jersey backing ensures all-day comfort.
  • Built as a statement hoodie that balances intent, style, and longevity.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the hoodie inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and print integrity.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain shape and prevent shrinkage.
  • Store in a cool, dry place to preserve structure and finish.

Core Features

  • Hoodie constructed with 420 GSM fabric for a substantial, premium feel.
  • Baggy fit suitable for relaxed and versatile styling.
  • Unisex article designed for a wide range of body types.
  • Front pouch pocket for everyday convenience and warmth.
  • Soft, breathable jersey fabric promotes comfort and airflow.
  • Long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hem for a secure, structured fit.

entry.title: FADED REALM
entry.summary:
Vendor: dripdrip.dopedesk
Type:
Price: 2399.00

MALE MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M HOODIE. 420 GSM VINTAGE WASHED FINISH PREMIUM 100% COTTON FLEECE HIGH-DENSITY PRINT FRONT AND BACK BROAD STRUCTURED HOOD WITH KANGAROO POCKET UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Ultra-heavy 420 GSM cotton fleece for premium weight and durability.
  • Luxury streetwear construction focused on comfort and structure.
  • Broad, structured hood for a bold and elevated silhouette.
  • Functional kangaroo pocket for everyday utility and warmth.
  • High-density DRIP STUDIOS print on both front and back.
  • Vintage washed finish gives every piece a unique, worn-in look.
  • Soft feel on skin while maintaining long-lasting quality.
  • Designed as an elevated everyday essential with timeless streetwear appeal.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the hoodie inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve the fabric’s quality.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage and maintain the fabric’s integrity.
  • Store the hoodie in a cool, dry place to prevent moisture or mold buildup.

Core Features

  • Hoodie with 420 GSM (Grams per Square Meter) for a durable and substantial feel.
  • Baggy fit for comfortable and versatile wear by both men and women.
  • Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences.
  • Front pouch pocket for convenient storage and added warmth.
  • Soft, breathable jersey fabric ensures comfort and airflow.
  • Long sleeves and ribbed cuffs and hem provide a snug and stylish fit.

entry.title: MOCHA DEPTH

Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: hoodies
Price: 2409.00

MALE MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M HOODIE.

420 GSM
PREMIUM 100% COTTON FLEECE
COMBED & BIO-WASHED FINISH
YRM EMBROIDERY DETAIL ON CHEST
EMBROIDERY DETAIL ON BACK
SIDE YKK ZIPPER POCKETS
KANGAROO POCKETS
BAGGY FIT
UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Ultra-heavy 420 GSM fleece delivers a rich, structured feel with lasting durability.
  • Premium YRM embroidered chest graphic adds a bold collegiate-inspired identity.
  • Back embroidery enhances craftsmanship and visual depth.
  • High-quality YKK side zipper pockets provide secure storage with a clean silhouette.
  • Broad, structured hood adds a relaxed yet powerful profile.
  • Functional kangaroo pockets offer everyday warmth and convenience.
  • Combed and bio-washed fabric ensures softness with long-term color retention.
  • Designed as an elevated everyday hoodie blending luxury comfort with streetwear edge.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the hoodie inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and embroidery detail.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage.
  • Store in a cool, dry place to maintain structure and finish.

Core Features

  • Hoodie constructed with 420 GSM fabric for a substantial, premium feel.
  • Baggy fit designed for relaxed comfort and versatile styling.
  • Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types.
  • Front pouch pocket for added warmth and convenience.
  • Soft, breathable jersey backing ensures comfort and airflow.
  • Long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hem for a secure, structured fit.

  • Functional kangaroo pockets provide everyday utility and warmth.
  • Combed and bio-washed fabric ensures a soft hand feel with lasting quality.
  • Designed as a timeless essential balancing minimal luxury with confident attitude.

Care Guide

  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and embroidery integrity.

  • Store in a cool, dry place to maintain shape and finish.

Core Features

  • Bold “VENI VIDI VICI” high-density print on the back ensures standout impact.

  • Two-way YKK zipper offers versatility, ease of wear, and premium functionality.
  • Double-layered hood enhances structure, warmth, and elevated styling.

  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and print integrity.

entry.title: UNHOLY SAINT ♡
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: hoodies
Price: 2409.00

MALE MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M HOODIE. 420 GSM PIPING WORK OVER SHOULDER, ARMS AND WAIST AREA PREMIUM 100% COTTON MATERIAL EMBROIDERY PRINT FRONT AND BACK (78,000+ embroidery stitches) BAGGY FIT [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS]. COMBED AND BIOWASHED.

Step into elevated streetwear with this 420 GSM super-premium sweatshirt, crafted for comfort, durability, and bold style. Made using combed and bio-washed fabric, it delivers a smooth, soft feel with long-lasting quality. The design features sleek piping work running across the shoulders, arms, and waist, adding a sharp, structured look. Front and back high-density embroidery make a strong statement, showcasing intricate detailing that stands out. With its relaxed fit, this sweatshirt blends effortless vibe with premium construction—perfect for everyday wear or standout street style.

Care Guide

* Machine wash the sweatshirt inside out with like colors. * Use cold water to preserve the fabric’s quality. * Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage and maintain the fabric’s integrity. * Store the sweatshirt in a cool, dry place to prevent moisture or mold buildup.

Core Features

* Sweatshirt with 420 GSM (Grams per Square Meter) for a durable and substantial feel. * Baggy fit for comfortable and versatile wear by both men and women. * Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences. * Front pouch pocket for convenient storage and added warmth. * Soft, breathable jersey fabric ensures comfort and airflow. * Long sleeves and ribbed cuffs and hem provide a snug and stylish fit.

  • Structured construction designed for elevated everyday wear.

  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and print integrity.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain shape and prevent shrinkage.

Core Features

  • Hoodie constructed with 420 GSM fabric for a substantial, premium feel.
  • Baggy fit for relaxed, comfortable, and versatile styling.
  • Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types.
  • Front pouch pocket for convenience and added warmth.
  • Soft, breathable jersey fabric ensures comfort and airflow.
  • Long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hem for a secure, structured fit.
